# BenchGecko v0.1.1 - Table of Contents

The CoinGecko for AI. Elixir client for AI model benchmarks, pricing comparison,
cost estimation, and agent discovery. Query structured data on 300+ models across
50+ providers with real benchmark scores and transparent pricing.

## Pages

- [BenchGecko for Elixir](readme.md)
- [LICENSE](license.md)

## Modules

- [BenchGecko](BenchGecko.md): The CoinGecko for AI.
- [BenchGecko.Agent](BenchGecko.Agent.md): Represents an AI agent with capabilities and evaluation scores.

- [BenchGecko.Model](BenchGecko.Model.md): Represents an AI model with benchmark scores, pricing, and metadata.
